$comment: Rules for generating Architecture Decision Records to persist learned agent context across sessions.

overrideRecord.$comment: Structure of each entry in learned-overrides.json.

fields.id: string — matches ADR filename without extension
fields.$comment_status: Reverted entries are skipped during hydration. Never delete entries.
fields.executableRule: string | boolean | string[] — the value to enforce

triggers.$comment: The agent must propose an ADR if any of these occur during a run.
conditions: A schema or workflow rule is manually overridden by the human
A recurring edge case requires handling not covered by existing rules
A new cross-repo dependency pattern is discovered
A CI policy violation is detected and resolved with a new rule

requiredSections: ## Context — what was the edge case or limitation?
## Decision — the new rule in plain language
